dataset_summary: Held-out financial time-series (e.g. daily returns / level series). A reservoir-computing model produces one-step-ahead forecasts over a fixed evaluation window. Scored on point-forecast error and directional accuracy, with strict leakage controls so no future information enters the feature window.
notes: Demo seed packet. evaluate.py is a dependency-light scaffold computing RMSE/MAE and directional accuracy from a predictions file. RMSE shown is an illustrative target.
